This is a Lean 4 / Mathlib repository for quantum information theory (MPS
tensors, quantum channels, Wielandt theorem). Your ONLY task is to scout Mathlib
and the existing codebase for relevant lemmas and post a scouting report. Do NOT
write code or create files. Be thorough -- search multiple keywords and naming
conventions. Mathlib sources are under .lake/packages/mathlib/Mathlib/.
